item.title: Point Rows with Larson Farms
item.description: A look at farming point rows, showing planting and field challenges at row ends, and how operators manage efficiency in irregular field shapes.

media:content.media:title: Point Rows with Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: A look at farming point rows, showing planting and field challenges at row ends, and how operators manage efficiency in irregular field shapes.

item.title: Planting Corn in Cold Ground
item.description: Corn planting begins in cold soil conditions, showing equipment operation, field conditions, and the challenges of early-season farming.

media:content.media:title: Planting Corn in Cold Ground
media:content.media:description: Corn planting begins in cold soil conditions, showing equipment operation, field conditions, and the challenges of early-season farming.

item.title: Finding a Stolen Car on the Farm
item.description: An unexpected discovery of a stolen car on farmland, showing the situation, response, and how it is handled in a real farm environment.

media:content.media:title: Finding a Stolen Car on the Farm
media:content.media:description: An unexpected discovery of a stolen car on farmland, showing the situation, response, and how it is handled in a real farm environment.

item.title: Farm Show in Crocs with Larson Farms
item.description: A lighthearted farm show moment featuring casual footwear, showing equipment, field work, and everyday agricultural life with a relaxed tone.

media:content.media:title: Farm Show in Crocs with Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted farm show moment featuring casual footwear, showing equipment, field work, and everyday agricultural life with a relaxed tone.

item.title: Yard Equipment Testing on the Farm
item.description: Farm equipment is tested in a yard setting, showing performance checks, handling, and practical evaluation before field use in daily operations.

media:content.media:title: Yard Equipment Testing on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment is tested in a yard setting, showing performance checks, handling, and practical evaluation before field use in daily operations.

item.title: Farm Equipment Not Ready Yet
item.description: A look at farm equipment that isn’t ready for use, showing preparation delays, troubleshooting, and real challenges in getting machines field-ready.

media:content.media:title: Farm Equipment Not Ready Yet
media:content.media:description: A look at farm equipment that isn’t ready for use, showing preparation delays, troubleshooting, and real challenges in getting machines field-ready.

item.title: Skid Vac vs Rocks on the Farm
item.description: A skid steer vacuum is tested against rocks, showing cleaning power, durability, and real farm equipment performance in tough conditions.

media:content.media:title: Skid Vac vs Rocks on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A skid steer vacuum is tested against rocks, showing cleaning power, durability, and real farm equipment performance in tough conditions.

item.title: New Farm Tiller Ready for the Field
item.description: A new tiller is prepared for field work, showing setup, testing, and readiness for soil preparation and agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: New Farm Tiller Ready for the Field
media:content.media:description: A new tiller is prepared for field work, showing setup, testing, and readiness for soil preparation and agricultural operations.

item.title: Fields Still Too Wet for Farming
item.description: Wet field conditions delay farm work, showing muddy terrain, equipment limitations, and challenges of timing agricultural operations after rain.

media:content.media:title: Fields Still Too Wet for Farming
media:content.media:description: Wet field conditions delay farm work, showing muddy terrain, equipment limitations, and challenges of timing agricultural operations after rain.

item.title: Building with Giant LEGO Blocks
item.description: Large-scale LEGO-style blocks are used in a creative build, showing oversized pieces, hands-on construction, and playful engineering on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Building with Giant LEGO Blocks
media:content.media:description: Large-scale LEGO-style blocks are used in a creative build, showing oversized pieces, hands-on construction, and playful engineering on the farm.
